summary: Tested P2/P3 monetization features including Commission Dashboard, Fraud Detection Rules, Mobile Sync System, Subscription Scheduler, and Wallet page. All features working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: Suspicious transaction detector has all 9 detection rules properly configured (velocity, amount, commission, account patterns)
Mobile sync system correctly exposes health checks and API compatibility verification at /api/mobile-sync/health
Payment fallback chain documented in Wallet UI: Balance → Stripe Connect → Card → Bank Account with 3 retries
Commission Dashboard route at /admin/commissions properly requires admin authentication
Subscription scheduler confirmed running with 2 jobs: subscription_renewals (3AM UTC) and payment_retries (every 6 hours)
context_for_next_testing_agent: P2/P3 monetization features fully tested. Commission Dashboard requires admin OTP auth. Mobile sync system operational with 6 feature flags enabled (stripe_payments, google_auth, photo_game, member_pages, commissions, notifications). Subscription scheduler has 2 active jobs. Wallet page displays 4 Top Up packages and 4 membership tiers with full payment fallback chain.

wallet_membership_section.payment_fallback_chain: Balance → Stripe Connect → Card → Bank Account (retries up to 3 times)
